title: FamilyServicesCenter
description: An OCME Family Services Center, Forensic Pathology Center, or specialized facility (Charles S. Hirsch Center for Forensic Sciences, World Trade Center Repository). Reconstructed from the OCME locations pages (nyc.gov/site/ocme/locations); there is NO Open Data twin — this directory exists today only as HTML on the site and a phone number for the Identification Unit. Keyed on facility name + borough.

name.description: Facility name, e.g. 'Manhattan Forensic Pathology and Family Services Center'.

enum: Charles S. Hirsch Center for Forensic Sciences

services.description: Services offered at this center (identification, viewing, family meetings, personal-effects return).

byAppointment.description: Whether visits are coordinated by appointment via the Identification Unit.
